name: Blog & Content
description: A modern blog platform with posts, categories, and comments
preview_description: Built for content creators and publishers. Features a post management system with categories, tags, comments, and full-text search. Clean, readable typography with responsive layouts.

name: SaaS Dashboard
description: A SaaS application with dashboard, user management, and billing
preview_description: Built for SaaS products and web applications. Features an admin dashboard with analytics widgets, user management, settings panels, and a marketing landing page. Professional, data-driven design.

name: Portfolio & Agency
description: A creative portfolio showcasing projects, services, and team
preview_description: Built for agencies, freelancers, and creative professionals. Features a project gallery with filtering, services showcase, team profiles, and an inquiry contact form. Bold, visual-first design.
